title: Systematic Anatomy
description: “As for an eight-foot-tall man... his body could be dissected and examined after death”, the ancient people had unique and ingenious descriptions of the human body's structure. Nowadays, let us, carrying the wisdom of the ancients, embark on the journey of systematic anatomy, to unveil the mysterious veil of the human body from the perspective of modern medicine, and to roam through the wonderful world intertwined with bones, muscles and nerves, thus starting a delightful exploration journey!“若夫八尺之士……其死可解剖而视之”，古人对人体结构的阐述匠心独运。如今，让吾辈携古人之智，踏上系统解剖学的征程，去揭开现代医学视角下人体的神秘面纱；在骨骼、肌肉与神经交织的奇妙天地间肆意遨游，开启一段欢乐的探索之旅！”
